title: Outcome Contract, Non-Goals, and Measures of Success · Mastery Review
summary: A review board compares near-miss decisions for outcome contract, non-goals, and measures of success and accepts only observable behavior, human evidence, explicit non-claims, and owned transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for measurable outcome and non-goal contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.
Define a baseline, observable leading and lagging measures, collection method, comparison window, and uncertainty.
Pair success measures with accessibility, equity, privacy, security, reliability, and burden guardrails.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Outcome Chain · changed case · Quiz Outcome Chain
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A team targets engagement growth without a baseline, causal path, burden guardrail, or threshold for stopping a harmful direction. The quiz variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.

Which action demonstrates Outcome Chain without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Outcome Chain · changed case · Quiz Outcome Chain.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality. For Outcome Chain · changed case · Quiz Outcome Chain, keep Outcome Chain connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A team targets engagement growth without a baseline, causal path, burden guardrail, or threshold for stopping a harmful direction. The quiz variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Connect product capability to user behavior, user outcome, stakeholder outcome, and public consequence without assuming causality.

content.text: Use the supplied trace to distinguish an observed Outcome Chain result from an unsupported claim.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing

stimulus.title: Stop Pivot Rule failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: required

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority. That claim does not survive the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define evidence thresholds that trigger continue, revise, pause, or stop decisions before sunk cost grows.
